# Enso Labs
> AI transformation consultancy, agentic systems studio, and financial AI agent lab.

## About
Enso Labs is a principal-led AI studio founded by Sav Banerjee in New York City. We architect enterprise AI strategy for Healthcare, Finance, and B2B Tech — then build the production systems that deliver it.

## Services
- AI Transformation Consulting: strategy, roadmapping, change management, responsible AI governance
- Agentic Systems & Products: LangGraph, MCP servers, Claude API, multi-agent orchestration
- Financial AI & Agentic Trading Systems: brokerage API integration, autonomous trading, signal intelligence

## Products
- [signal2noise](https://signals.ensolabs.ai): Daily AI intelligence for marketing strategists
- [Enso Trading Terminal](https://ensolabs.ai/work/trading-terminal): Autonomous financial AI agents
- [ensolabs.ai](https://ensolabs.ai): AI-native studio website built in 24 hours

## Case Studies
- [AI Market Intelligence Platform](https://ensolabs.ai/work/gore): Fortune 500 manufacturer, 731 documents, 16 signals
- [AI Center of Excellence](https://ensolabs.ai/work/heller): Pharma agency, 83% faster launches
- [Enso Trading Terminal](https://ensolabs.ai/work/trading-terminal): Autonomous trading, live in production
- [Enterprise AI Programs](https://ensolabs.ai/work/enterprise-ai): 75% pilot-to-production

## Founder
Sav Banerjee — 15+ years at Google, McCann, Publicis, RAPP, Y&R. Certified by Anthropic, Google, OpenAI. Perplexity AI Business Fellowship Winner.
